calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Samantha P. Wong.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:17 a.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Samira Peacock, Associate Vendor Management Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Brumage and Ms. Peacock appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Samantha P. Wong.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book and Account Stated) was filed on May 28, 28, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Samantha P. Wong occurred on September 6, 2021, and was effectuated on September 18, 2021.
Default as to defendant Samantha P. Wong was entered on November 18, 2021.
No DOE defendant were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Electronic Record of Account Application...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Samantha P. Wong, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,438.86.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $35,438.86.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:25 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2021 Continued To Dec-29-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
